---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving incorrectly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Include which component is
affected if you know it (e.g., form filler, resume scorer, job discovery, UI, API).

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to / run ...
2. Click / pass flags ...
3. Observe ...

Please be as specific as possible. If the bug is intermittent, note how often it
occurs.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. If the bot submitted something it should not have, or skipped
something it should have caught, please describe it carefully.

## Platform

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. macOS 15.2, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.11.9 (run `python3 --version`) |
| Node version (if UI-related) | e.g. 20.11.0 |
| Browser (if UI-related) | e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 126 |
| job-bot commit or version | e.g. `git rev-parse --short HEAD` output |

## Logs

Paste relevant output from the terminal or the Dashboard log stream. Redact any
personal information (name, email, phone, company names you applied to) before
posting.

```
(paste logs here)
```

If a screenshot helps illustrate the problem, attach it here. **Blur or crop out any
personal information before attaching.**

## Additional context

Any other context that might be relevant — ATS platform affected, job board, specific
form layout, network conditions, etc.
